examples: This cow is bigger than that cow.
This sheep is smaller than that sheep.
That goat is bigger than the other goats.
The horse is bigger than the goat.
The girl is taller than the boy.
The boy is shorter than the girl.
The sheep is smaller than the cow.
The hen is louder than the chick.
The goat is faster than the cow.
The cow is slower than the goat.
There's a cow behind the gate.
There's a goat between the horse and the van.
There's a goose behind the tree.

phonics.description: Long vowel e spelled ee, as in tree. Two e's together make the long e sound.
chant: Look up at the green tree.
